cases.prompt: Walk me through investigating a multi-stage attack across endpoint and identity in Defender XDR.

expect.label: investigate by incident, not by individual alert
the attack graph shows the kill chain across workloads
use advanced hunting KQL over the shared schema
automatic attack disruption can contain a high-confidence active attack

cases.prompt: Which Defender workloads must I onboard before I can claim Defender XDR coverage?

expect.label: MDE + MDI + Entra ID Protection at minimum
rule of thumb a real incident touches at least two workloads
MDO and MDA add email and SaaS coverage

cases.prompt: Roll out unified RBAC and automatic attack disruption safely in Defender XDR.

expect.label: unified RBAC configured first, before broad enablement
run attack disruption in report-only mode for ~14 days first
custom detection rules need entity mappings to correlate into incidents
